zh.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury於大約1225年出生在英國爾布波瑞。她於大約1239年與William de Bunbury在英國英格蘭爾布波瑞結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury于大约1225年出生在英国爾布波瑞。她于大约1239年与William de Bunbury在英国英格兰爾布波瑞结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury was born about 1225, in Bunbury, Cheshire, England. She married William de Bunbury about 1239, in Bunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury est née environ 1225, à Bunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William de Bunbury environ 1239, à Bunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury wurde um 1225 in Bunbury, Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1239 in Bunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William de Bunbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury è nata il circa 1225 nel Bunbury, Cheshire, England. Lei sposato William de Bunbury circa 1239, nel Bunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunburyは約1225年にイギリスチェシュアイアブンブリーで生まれた。約1239年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブンブリーでWilliam de Bunburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury(은)는 대략 1225년 영국 체실르 버버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버버이에서 William de Bunbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Bunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William de Bunbury aproximadamente 1239, em Bunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury родилась около 1225 г. в местности бунбури, чешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Bunbury около 1239 г. в местности бунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Matilda Baroness de Bunbury nació aproximadamente 1225, en Bunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con William de Bunbury aproximadamente 1239, en Bunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija.
